name: Dual-domain fused LSTM modeling for efficient time-dependent reliability analysis

description: arXiv:2607.18291v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Time-dependent reliability analysis is crucial for ensuring the long-term safety and performance of engineering systems under uncertainties. However, traditional surrogate model methods often struggle to incorporate time-independent random variables and capture their complex interactions with time-dependent stochastic processes. To overcome this...
author: Yixin Zhang, Mingyang Li, Zichao Jiang
